name: Bede
oneLiner: An N8 research GPU system that pairs V100, T4, and Grace-Hopper nodes for small and medium-scale AI work.
summary: Bede supports researchers across the N8 universities and offers a compact but useful mix of accelerators for AI workloads. The system includes IBM Power9 nodes with NVIDIA V100 GPUs, a smaller NVIDIA T4 inference partition, and newer Grace-Hopper pilot nodes introduced in 2024. This combination makes Bede especially well suited to experimentation with model serving, moderate-scale training, and CPU-GPU integrated workflows.

keyFacts.hardware: 32 IBM Power9 dual-CPU nodes with NVIDIA V100 GPUs, 4 NVIDIA T4 inference nodes, and 3 Grace-Hopper pilot nodes
keyFacts.performance: Regional GPU system focused on small and medium-scale AI workloads
keyFacts.funding: N8 partnership with additional EPSRC access routes
keyFacts.energy: Shared regional cluster with mixed-generation accelerator estate

access.route: N8 researchers use Bede without charge; external researchers can apply via EPSRC access routes.
